expectations.evidence: app/Providers/AppServiceProvider.php configures TurboPartner in boot() method, serving as the config/service setup file
AppServiceProvider.php calls TurboPartner::configure(new PartnerClientConfig(partnerApiKey: env('TURBODOCX_PARTNER_API_KEY'), partnerId: env('TURBODOCX_PARTNER_ID')))
routes/api.php defines Route::prefix('organizations')->group() with Route::post and Route::get
OrganizationController extends Controller class, uses response()->json(), Request $request injection, and $request->validate()
No file contains TURBODOCX_API_KEY in .env or .env.example — only partner vars are present
Generated files use .php extension (OrganizationController.php, AppServiceProvider.php, api.php, etc.)
